tasks.subject: Task 0: pixi live-modal env + modal dependency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A `live-modal` pixi env exists with the `modal` SDK importable, mirroring `live-skypilot`.

**Files:** Modify pixi.toml (+ pixi.lock).

**Verify:** `pixi run -e live-modal python -c "import modal; print(modal.__version__)"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pixi.toml", "pixi.lock"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -e live-modal python -c \"import modal; print(modal.__version__)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["modal importable in live-modal env", "pixi.lock staged with pixi.toml", "default env unchanged"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Modal GPU offer catalog + modal_offers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function returns static Modal GPU catalog as Offers filtered by HardwareRequirements, mode=serverless.

**Files:** Create src/kinoforge/providers/modal/_catalog.py, __init__.py, tests/providers/modal/test_catalog.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_catalog.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/_catalog.py", "src/kinoforge/providers/modal/__init__.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_catalog.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_catalog.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["catalog has correct Modal GPU strings + VRAM", "all offers mode=serverless", "modal_offers filters by vram + orders by preference"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ModalProvider skeleton — registry, seams, heartbeat, find_offers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ModalProvider registers as modal, injected seams, find_offers + heartbeat noop + last_heartbeat None.

**Files:** Modify providers/modal/__init__.py + _adapters.py; create tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registry resolves modal to ModalProvider", "find_offers returns filtered catalog", "last_heartbeat None + heartbeat noop", "injectable seams present"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: build_modal_app — the reuse hinge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure builder constructs modal.App whose serialized web_server(8000) runs provision_script; exec run_cmd, with image/gpu/volume/secret.

**Files:** Create src/kinoforge/providers/modal/_app.py, tests/providers/modal/test_app.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_app.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/_app.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wires image/app/volume", "function kwargs carry gpu/serialized/scaledown/volume/secret", "web_server port 8000 + startup_timeout", "secret payload has provision_script + run_cmd"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: create_instance — deploy + return HTTP endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** create_instance builds app request from spec+offer, deploys via seam, returns Instance(starting, endpoints 8000 url).

**Files:** Modify providers/modal/__init__.py + tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/__init__.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["maps offer.gpu_type + lifecycle to app request", "returns Instance starting with endpoints 8000 url", "records deployment", "raises on missing run_cmd/offer"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: get/list/stop/destroy_instance + endpoints (bounded teardown)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Inventory + teardown via lister/stopper seams, bounded destroy poll (_DESTROY_POLL_MAX_ITERS=40), endpoints reader.

**Files:** Modify providers/modal/__init__.py + tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/ -v && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/__init__.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_provider.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/ -v && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["endpoints returns recorded url", "list_instances filters kinoforge- prefix", "get_instance returns or raises", "destroy bounded by 40-iter poll, idempotent"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Milestone 1 config + build_provider_for characterization test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** modal-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml resolves through build_provider_for to ModalProvider; omits cloud:.

**Files:** Create examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml, tests/test_modal_config.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_modal_config.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml", "tests/test_modal_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_modal_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["config provider=modal, cloud omitted, diffusers t2v 1.3B", "build_provider_for returns ModalProvider", "spec targets 1.3B cheaply 480x480 33f"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: LIVE transport smoke — prove Modal deploy for pennies (USER-GATE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Prove Modal deploy → live .modal.run URL → teardown with a trivial hello-world server, before any weights spend.

**Files:** Create tests/live/test_modal_transport_smoke.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run -e live-modal pytest tests/live/test_modal_transport_smoke.py -v -s`

```json:metadata
{"userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "files": ["tests/live/test_modal_transport_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -e live-modal pytest tests/live/test_modal_transport_smoke.py -v -s", "acceptanceCriteria": ["endpoints['8000'] is a https .modal.run URL", "GET url returns 200 within startup window", "destroy returns bounded AND app no longer listed", "spend is a few cents"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: LIVE Milestone 1 proof — Wan 2.1 T2V-1.3B generation (USER-GATE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Produce a real Wan 2.1 T2V-1.3B video via kinoforge generate on Modal, frame-QA, log as first Modal-provider generation.

**Files:** Create tests/live/test_modal_wan_t2v_1_3b.py; modify successful-generations.md + PROGRESS.md.

**Verify:** generate command exits 0 with playable 480x480 mp4; frame-QA verdict recorded; kinoforge list + modal app list clean.

```json:metadata
{"userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "files": ["tests/live/test_modal_wan_t2v_1_3b.py", "successful-generations.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -e live-modal kinoforge generate --config examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml --mode t2v --prompt \"$(cat examples/configs/prompts/field-realistic.txt)\" --no-reuse", "acceptanceCriteria": ["playable 480x480 ~33f mp4 produced", "frames eyeballed coherent + prompt-adherent, verdict recorded", "kinoforge list AND modal app list both clean after", "successful-generations.md Modal section added", "spend within $30 credit"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
